jd:
中级测试工程师招聘。负责 Web 测试、APP 测试、接口测试、回归测试、缺陷跟踪、自动化测试。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — basic scripting.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — interface tests.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — basic SQL.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — shell basics.
Git Git Git Git Git — basic version control.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — basic ticket handling.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Jenkins、Git、JIRA 等工具。2-4 years QA experience required.
